a:r.a:t: Requirement → AI-built VCRM & Checklist (admin-editable, approved in
Enter a requirement →AI builds the VCRM + Checklist → admin can add/delete sub-items → attach deliverables → VCRM & Checklist are approved together in the Impact + Approval step before production.
REQ-014 · Ballast Water Treatment · cap >= 250 m3/h · IMO D-2
All REQ items mapped to VCRM
VCRM & Checklist are approval items inside the Impact + Approval step — production releases only when all are approved together.
